contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: dao_protocol: wire Bugsnag error tracking into the FastAPI server
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/43
  
  Details:
  Added Bugsnag error tracking to the dao_protocol server. New config field bugsnag_api_key (env DAO_PROTOCOL_BUGSNAG_API_KEY); create_app() calls bugsnag.configure() and adds the bugsnag.asgi.BugsnagMiddleware only when the key is set -- empty key is a full no-op (SDK not imported, no middleware, zero overhead). release_stage = the environment setting (production on the box). Added bugsnag>=4.7.0 to requirements-server.txt, 2 new tests (60 total pass). Merged #43 and deployed gate-independent to seni_ror_new:8010 (health green). Activates as soon as the API key is placed in the box .env and the service restarts.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
